flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Montcalm Community College rose 25% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.2k → $16.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Montcalm Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Montcalm Community College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.0k → $10.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Montcalm Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (50.5% → 56.8%).
